reasoning: A government-affiliated tax collection company must project authority, competence, and clarity. The selected Swiss/High-Contrast archetype utilizes a stark white foundation with high-contrast slate text and the requested Azure blue (#1E88E5) for precise, functional focal points. This approach avoids generic SaaS templates while remaining strictly professional.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-semibold tracking-tight leading-none text-slate-900
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight leading-tight text-slate-900
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-semibold tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-slate-500

typography.guidelines: Never use Inter for headings. Use Outfit for a modern, slightly geometric authority. Keep line-height tight on headings.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-8, p-12, or p-16 for main container padding. Avoid cramped sections.

grids.marketing: Use The 'Tetris' Grid for services (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12, wide gap-8 to gap-12, asymmetrical spanning like col-span-4 row-span-2).
grids.dashboards: Use The 'Control Room' Grid for the CMS/Admin sections and Portals (tight gap-4 or gap-6, utilized full height).

surfaces.header: Crystal Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200/50). Must not be fully transparent.
surfaces.cards: Flat background with a sharp 1px border (border-slate-200). Hover state: slight lift (-translate-y-1), subtle shadow (shadow-lg), and border color shifts to primary (#1E88E5).
surfaces.footer: Dark mode footer (bg-slate-900 text-slate-400) with massive spacing (py-24). Highlight the primary brand in white.

components.buttons: Square or very slightly rounded (rounded-md). High contrast. Primary buttons must be bg-[#1E88E5] text-white hover:bg-[#1565C0]. Include hover states for all buttons.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Form components. Inputs must have clear border-slate-300 focus:border-[#1E88E5] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#1E88E5].
components.navigation: Clear visible desktop links. Avoid hiding everything behind a hamburger menu on desktop. Use Shadcn NavigationMenu if appropriate.
components.marquee: Use an organic, slow-moving 'Editorial Ribbon' for the Municipalities logos. Pale background with clear, high-contrast logos.

animations.page_load: Framer motion staggered fade-ins for grids.
animations.hover: Transition transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. Explicitly set text color on hover.

hero_background.description: Abstract 3D network and data visualization for the hero section background to convey tech-forward taxation.

hero_office.description: Modern glass office building for 'Chi siamo' or hero alternative.

team_meeting.description: Business people in a meeting for the 'Lavora con noi' or Profile sections.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width of 1.5 for a clean, professional, non-chunky look. Use the primary blue (#1E88E5) for active/highlighted icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the selected fonts (Outfit for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body). Add them via Google Fonts in index.html.
Do not use generic template layouts. Construct the services grid using the 'Tetris' bento logic with asymmetrical spans.
All interactive elements must include data-testid attributes.
Never use pure white (#FFFFFF) text on a transparent background over an image without a gradient overlay (bg-black/30 to bg-black/50) or glassmorphism panel.
Use only Shadcn components for forms, dialogs, and interactive widgets. Strip away the Vercel/Stripe default look to match the high-contrast Swiss styling.
Do NOT use placeholder text for images. Use only the provided image URLs.
Ensure complete WCAG AA accessibility. Check contrast for the primary blue (#1E88E5) against white.
Structure pages as single Page or multiple Pages, utilizing React Router if necessary, given the requested multiple pages (Profile, Services, etc.).
